h8e9aba1eg7c92g4df8gbcaagbfc2750a73e8: I know the gith heirloom you possess is important to my kin. I was told so.
hbd695b91g789ag4784ga8bdg0858043a1e8c: Tell me what you are doing with it.
h725189e0gb000g45c2g9d71gbc38a2ba8fde: It's my prize. I'll die to protect it.
hd661a84bg6b67g49b2gb2b8g443a36200555: Hm. A creation of my people, though I cannot decipher writing this ancient.
h7a76e8cdga1aag4e8eg8e92g0a62f2e44419: Keep it. Do what you will with it.
h57fc1c06gb54cg4a37gb631g39472d493db8: It is for other gith to hunt and punish you. And they will, knowing my kin.
h106d28a0g0f57g4c69g96e4g5a14f9e570de: But it is not my mission to collect your head. The ghaik parasites come first.
hb40ab25dg6dfag47ecgbd64gecbfb4c1d5e1: I am content. Go, rest. Dawn breaks all too soon.
h29d704e7gb0ecg40cag918bg5d8fbc7c4da1: Tuck the relic away and turn to leave.
hfa1f47c7g15bcg48fbg80c0ga104c9652a81: Your contraband does not concern me, but it may concern my kin. Assume you are being hunted.
hc3937903g9eeeg43f1ga458g2d19b5f7d6c7: Unfortunate. I thought you may have some honour.
h2d377360gac27g4338g8d2cg94f5e5e47825: Go, rest. But do not consider this matter settled.
hd44f96edg6553g448eg925bgef2b0e96c341: Sssh... do not move. Do not cry out. Or I will open your neck.
h9bad65efg1c34g4d83g8a0cg8cdedded733f: You have lied about the heirloom. I will have the truth, or I will have your life.
h3d4afffdgeb22g4f1dga4dbgea171456f037: A sorry tale. Barely worth interrogating you over. Show me the heirloom.
hc8da6e2fg8dfbg4ecdgb44cg37b9c954b2fc: No matter. I can examine it for myself. Be still and this will be quick.
h8b522c5dg1696g414ag8d80g0d351578a152: Hm. A creation of my people, though I cannot decipher writing this ancient.
h4bd248fdgdbd9g4d7dga53fg573021da2f65: Keep it. Do what you will with it.
ha430ab85gcfc9g4558gad92g538df7e83c34: Wait. You held a blade to my throat over this, and now you don't care?
h1f34b463g863dg4c62ga6f8g77e9b937a5e0: Purification is my mission - not your contraband. I am content for the time being.
hac352c2ag8266g4e73g90b7geaaa1073908e: But beware. My kin undoubtedly hunt you. If caught, your death will be slow, exquisite.
hfa7b4f0cg1c82g47fegb6a5g029fb3cfd5d5: Rest. Dawn breaks all too soon.
h508e28deg4b67g4becg9240g0a4f6a3a1222: Ha! Very well, let us make this interesting.
he51c9e0cg90f7g4d50g8cf4g6d1075d842bb: An invaliant struggle. You are consistent to the end.
h750f84c0g9d96g460eg9992gca86300307b6: Offer her a half-truth. Say you found it on a dead gith.
h1e1bf60bg996cg4734g928bgbc7af3b21cc1: Perhaps this is so. Show me the heirloom.
hadc7f184g43b9g4ff6g96d8g65a0fad39876: I am certain you did. And now I shall find it in turn, on a dead half-elf.
h11067c62g3adbg4266g900bgc8a904fabee9: Do your worst. I won't tell you anything.
h9a206dc1g91acg41bbg8acaga96eb151041a: My worst is for worthy foes. This will have to suffice.
h16b9df44gd4deg410bg8313g7b5d41f7a8d7: You've been misinformed. By who, I wonder?
ha4579f3cg6462g4a32g93a9gd4877c72f091: And yet here I stand. Concerned.
hdc784a4dgf149g4103ga5e1g804d4e5b44f7: It's nothing. A lucky keepsake I found in some ruins.
hbad4f53dgfbd4g4e99ga7c1g196caff89a3f: A keepsake. Very well. Perhaps I was misinformed.
h2028e57bg0330g442bgbd1fg46cd3c33a959: We shall see. Now let us rest.
h8dcce39bge5e0g4accg9f15g4aba070aed29: Your lies are not as cunning as you think, istik. Show me this 'keepsake'.
h230a8b99g38d8g46a4g8a16gae11fb8c9ec9: *Shadowheart keeps one hand on something hidden beneath her clothing.*
h7319bfd7g61beg4041gba90gf4b499d786bd: I don't know what qualifies as manners with your kind, but in Faerûn it's rude to stare.
h936e9142ga23bg4861g94b5g70e9c3c1f290: What exactly were you doing before the ghaik seized you?
hdc200d8egc1cfg4e16gb45dg7a4a4e3a29d0: Now why would you ask me a question like that?
hf3689a56gc58fg4f5bg9740ge9b63cba906a: I am merely curious about my travelling companion.
hf8f37101g6668g45d9g99ddg7a5e29800455: Lae'zel. You're not really the type for idle chatter. Don't develop the habit now.
hb7fa1abegb884g4a12gbe66gad33115be81d: I know you have something precious to my kin. Explain yourself.
h7228d91fg9ab8g4854g91b0g54dda6e78438: I don't know what you're talking about. I suspect you don't know what you're talking about.
h472cc85agef6dg4845gbd4ag37f9a4048d38: I will have an explanation from you, or I will have your head.
hee7ea58dga9b6g452ag8172g691e095e82c9: Fine. It's a lucky keepsake, nothing more. I found it in a flea market.
h29c8a53eg420fg4735g9434g009ee56f8f45: If that is true, you will have no qualms with showing it to me.
h49a674eegd181g4f1cga77agf4626c156214: Another time, I'm terribly tired. You should get some rest, Lae'zel.
hf21d12c7gaa55g4431g834dgb1c4abd70cd9: I needn't have woken you at all. I could've just buried this dagger in your throat.
h05fc0ee9g6cc7g4818g8d12g5f4d75cfab59: I still could. Then no more Lae'zel to stick her metaphorical nose in my affairs...
hccdb0570g5920g4d0bga197ga9e3350f2bda: You talk a great deal for a murderer. Get on with it, if you dare try.
hecbb52f2g561fg40e5ga784g400cfdd49cbd: I'll kill you if necessary. But explaining your corpse would be a chore.
h1f3aad8fg82a2g4b7fgaa8bg5db8da7c727b: If I knew you weren't a threat to me - to my mission - then perhaps we could make peace.
he03140c3g0f33g406cg801cga6e6bbb5024d: So. Can you let the matter drop, or should I put you back to sleep permanently?
ha622de5dga290g4ab7gb48eg64914c405679: Good. This little venture would be duller without you, I'll admit.
h8e4bff5dg565fg4c28gac7cg8cdbdbeeccd4: But if you break your promise, I'll kill you. Sleep well.
h7a0fe308gf689g46e9gb88bgce5dd7a056c8: My creed forbids such weakness. Explain yourself - and then try to kill me.
h6e50338fg0991g49c4gb7abg983c652b8a43: Persistent, aren't you? Under different circumstances, I'm sure we'd get on quite well.
h0d0a029fgb082g48f5g8d6bg7482a359be4b: There. Is that worth your life?
hfe8a0ce7gfadeg443cgb4e0g8b93b008f851: The relic is gith, but means nothing to me. You can do with it as you like.
h16bf6d70g2d48g4f34g8389ga26ed80334fb: Hmm. You seem sincere, oddly enough. Let's say we have an understanding.
h0a9623eag3511g4632g8b50gd37aaf14e7c3: But if that comes into doubt, I'll kill you. Sleep well.
h77c69f72g47b6g4514gb51fgabeb8defc460: The gith you took this from will hunt you down and kill you. Slowly.
h8d498a0agb426g414bg839bg8f870a351efe: They are more than welcome to try.
h16646b88g1c8cg4379g91e6g32d7741a9f30: Grasp a handful of dirt and fling it in her face.
h2b04f599ga5d8g4cb8gafc6gf1edc722e564: I don't care what you believe, Lae'zel. Go to sleep.
hf9bd5f90gd0f4g4ac5g8d4ag9a2fc557248d: You're welcome to try. Otherwise, back off.
h052c692egb2cbg4172gb072g208896c1adb9: *You sense her fear - that you will try to take the heirloom.*
h2ae5cb48gea79g4038g82b3g1d32f287a121: If you explain yourself, perhaps I will allow you to keep the heirloom.
hf288ecb0g97fdg487dg951agc7bcca4e68b5: Agh... I felt that. Get away from me, gith!
hf58e663fg1d0fg4d34g8753g657dede2679a: You carry a githyanki relic. I will have an explanation - or your head.
h93e6a45bge87cg4dd1gaa41g5c555707ea47: Walk away. Now. I won't warn you again.
h69a03c52g577bg433fga4a0g1b52a45840e2: What's going on? Why're you two arguing?
h6957efa0g02a7g4faeg8aa1g790d9034068f: She carries an heirloom of our people. She must explain herself.
h52cf2498g447cg4361g9500g1ed8b720724d: She is deluded - as are you, should you show her your allegiance.
hc55be993gaebfg442bga5d2g11218744d761: The gith thinks I have something important to her people. She's deluded, clearly.
h464907eeged89g4721g8774gfb2e2b3662da: Lies. She carries an heirloom of my people. I must know why.
hdba6fd80g95dag4862gafdcg19da8e4ef02a: This matter concerns both of us, kin. Shadowheart has deceived us.
h04a9cd6ag4feeg47e8g855bgac30596ba25c: Nonsense. You're just finally showing what you really are - a reaver to the bone.
h5a128a43g2c05g4231gbacage03fe986c614: Nonsense. You're just finally showing us what you really are - a reaver to the bone.
h6a898554gf967g441ag9279g76d137894aa5: Spare your indignity. Every word that spills from your mouth is worth less than the last.
h1957487cg112bg49b1ga163gf58ad89cf060: Again, stop this. No sense in us fighting with each other.
h08ddfbeag1b52g4476gb8e7g6cc0cb6a23df: Incorrect. Judicious bloodletting settles feuds and roots out the weak - the deceitful.
hf06d95e3g8016g41f9g8bd8g87e03ed7303e: Do you hear this tripe? Our lives are at stake, and she wants us to turn on each other.
he342f86dga91cg456eg8d3agc4786db21261: No others. Just you and me.
h6fdc0ec1g8dbag4349ga00eg093ae06eee97: Stop this. No sense in us fighting with each other.
h7508fe96g56f1g43d0g9401ge53d56e98d02: We can't afford secrets. Shadowheart - you owe Lae'zel an explanation.
ha63bbdecg8edcg4e08g99a5g7c6884613b0f: I owe nothing of the sort.
ha794d607gc046g4f30ga01eg02de01cb7f39: Besides, how would you like to explain everything you're carrying?
h6d96ca9ag8afeg4afdgb54dg08160b2f4fd8: Lae'zel, why are you picking fights when we've so many problems already?
hd80ed68agd099g4015g90c0gd8855beafd9a: Honour. She could produce the relic and end this now. Instead, she argues.
h1e591a75g6750g4ae1g9adeg243d926eb749: You're the unreasonable one here. I was having a peaceful evening until you came over.
h5d004d6egc24dg40c3g828fga6677aee4069: Raphael's words ring true. He said she wronged our kin and carries a relic as her trophy.
h0a61fa13g58c2g48e9gb174g173174c3b101: Raphael's words ring true. He said she wronged my kin and carries a relic as her trophy.
h5ccb32d5gee5fg4193gbfa9g93f5bbfd4137: And you believed him? Then you're a fool or an opportunist - maybe both.
h7dce7f40g2e16g4a37gb15egdc707dd345e6: So. Any ideas on how we settle this?
h280b2445gf9cbg4817gb5c8geee579237c12: The bad blood must be purged. A duel, come first light.
h1e02b342gce4cg4e77gbbc9g50e8ed1b4eda: You mean I'd get to prove you wrong and thrash you? I love it.
hd4196b9eg7347g4ab0g871eg1227f6e68d01: Get some rest, gith - you'll need it.
h7b1a4d8ag3c35g4e67ga59bgbd51251ed42f: The truth, now. Or vermin will feast on your carcass.
hc01f3973gb828g4419g85aag62ec77d08e2f: I should have seen this coming, coward.
h99d509e5gc94eg4976g8385g9bac77e2e9e7: For you, my Queen: a thief's blood!
h37dc1014ge000g466bg95c4g7b128c93ee96: Lae'zel - stop. Before you do something you'll regret.
h0730f15dgddeag42d9g8ea4g1a827feef2e0: You're lucky I respect him. One more chance, then - tell me about the relic.
h0c336255g811fg4438gbc9cgbd306feaf1cc: You're lucky I respect her. One more chance, then - tell me about the relic.
h3a68addfgf62ag4093g985fg6683ccf69e0e: You must. Or you will take your secrets to the grave.
h0afa930age3b7g4cfbgad3age8f1b3526f60: I can't tell what I don't know. Shar willed it, so I obeyed.
h26e416eeg9af8g4076ga600g37f95f10b864: Many of us were sent to take it from your kin. I'm the last one left.
h59fa1910g2979g410cg883bg151c8160af91: I don't know what it is, what it does... I just have to get it to Baldur's Gate.
h9b794425g3a27g4d40gadd3gf525af21eca0: Stand down, Lae'zel. You've gotten what you wanted.
ha4e379c4g8badg46c3gaf41ge267e3a6d551: Yes, I am content - for the time being. But I will suffer no more of your lies.
hea2a03dfge6aeg4f85gbaadg0ef08baa6c76: Really? You aren't going to just kill me and take the box?
h45c612a8g9458g432fga95ege9e245cd9081: This is not my mission. But you will be caught, and my Queen will punish you as she sees fit.
h896919b6g7c3fg40d8gbe66gd726c62949d9: That's all? There has to be more.
h4cc54912g3616g4f3dg8c07gddd17fcf776e: No. For now, I am content. But I will suffer no more of your lies.
h61cddf05gd346g46c5g9f32ge2f832cef57a: For now, I am content. But I will suffer no more of your lies.
he21eadf9g3013g4d1fgbb71g3e2c3f6d941a: I can't tell what I don't know. My goddess willed it, so I obeyed.
had9f35f7gd0dcg4513gadd4g781a94d96470: I'm not going to regret this - I'm going to enjoy it.
he238e2dfgc2d6g4a2dg9becg5d07151a711f: Should've kept your focus on me, gith.
h9bb12828gc49eg442ag9dbagfa34962057bf: *There is no way to prevent bloodshed. You must choose.*
h003fa001ged5bg4415gb7a3g05e808816129: May your death be slow, and your agony great!
hb9401f2fgfa8bg4a42gac11gda1301e64130: Lae'zel - stop. Before you do something you'll regret.
h071125f8gdc6eg4312g93f4g345ed228f7cc: Your petty quarrels disturbed my rest. Stop at once, or I will make you stop.
h22c6925dg1debg43ceg85e3g97490e58a9b8: You should have stayed out of this!
h8fe70707g46f2g43d6ga708g7dea31a2d059: You should have taken your own advice.
h47811d48ge72ag4892ga78bgaea3cd8662e9: You had every chance to look the other way, but here we are. You chose this.
haa214fbcg63a5g4b45gb698gf198a88d281f: If anyone asks, I'll say you were transforming. Don't expect to be mourned.
hd81f5cf2gbf0cg43c3g87eagd8b2a05d6c59: Take this slain foe as a gift, blessed Nightsinger. Usher her into your darkness.
h36b4949bg2cfcg43d4g8debg5d1de7281443: Shadowheart - stop. You don't have to do this.
hdd34daf9g2a28g4201g8ed9g918dfd52eaaf: He just bought you an extra moment. What will you do with it?
hc7f6bf6fg433eg4bd0ga4c6g4962914b6e65: She just bought you an extra moment. What will you do with it?
h9ec1bf14gf6d9g43bbg8ac6g80b1549f7a3b: Let me up, and I'll show you.
h881f3920gc403g4254gb076g295edd843789: Cooperate, Lae'zel. For your own sake.
h8c66fe67gee8eg4419gba3cgeaed06b963e8: You would have me surrender, kin? A disgusting notion.
h2e63cef2g2dfdg49e4gb61dgc62e2198bc8e: It wouldn't be surrender - just a little compromise. Stop hounding me, and I'll let you live.
hc3eda247g1586g4d96gbaf3g67fe38f6639a: So be it. Keep the heirloom. It is not my mission.
h4f1145c6ge840g466egafb7g028d15325f6a: But my Queen will reclaim it in time.
h0ca87442g7006g46e1g8c10g3acda0a44f59: She can try. Go rest. Just remember I spared you.
h737fb755gf76ag4239gb330gd5f37c4b440b: We need her, Shadowheart. Give her a chance.
hb2c78a44g8e4cg4622ga81dg22badc80b059: Can I do that, Lae'zel? Can I turn my back on you?
h92c532b3g0a62g44a4g811ag4b33a0fa1448: For now. Keep the heirloom. It is not my mission.
h72668b4dg46d5g46e0gabeagdf3a223eaf39: *There is no way to prevent bloodshed. You have to choose.*
h09df06f2g444fg4f58gb79bg3b6982dce0a6: May your death be slow, and your agony great!
h7576729fgdb49g48a4g8973g593a44a49236: Shadowheart - stop. You don't have to do this.
h7dea6643gfb9ag4175gbc6fg7ca35c328c2f: Your petty quarrels disturbed my rest. Stop at once, or I will make you stop.
hfb65f975gb309g4045g9a9egc4b07ed8889f: You too? Shar take you both, then!
h71cd6bc9gc0ffg4d1dga873g3d225a78377b: Rest - both of you. Tempers will be cooler in the morning.
h0f4bfff5g1d13g4023g8feegf704ccb9a06b: I doubt this one's wits will be any sharper by then.
hf443df0bg753fg4877gb3e0gd758c220a144: I do not wish to spill blood here. Come daylight, we will find a place to end this.
hc0f2583eg9f29g4045g9751g94f353935c72: Fine. You can accept you're wrong, or we'll be rid of you permanently. Either way, I win.
h14fcb0beg0e71g4a77g8c2eg217b3899859d: Remove yourself, if you are so easily offended. This is not your concern.
h45156aa1g5e12g4f4bg9848g76ecbe280994: You have something precious to my kin. Prove me wrong if you can.
h67c71c93g0c7dg4b0cgbc37gf607c0c7ebc0: I have nothing to prove to you, gith. It was a mistake to take you with us.
hbbeffd23gb3d1g40b3ga993g7253e2f93549: The devil told me you possess a githyanki relic. Prove him wrong, if you can.
h76721e57gac05g440bga052g9bd76799e8f9: You accepted Raphael's word as the truth? You're an even bigger fool that I thought.
h398d1f32gcc1bg40cdga3acg7100597c5554: Leave them to settle their differences and go to sleep.
